practice.name: Problem 22 (2017 AMC 8)
practice.statement: In the right triangle, AB = 6, BC = 8, and angle B = 90°. A semicircle is inscribed in the triangle as shown. What is the radius of the semicircle?

practice.name: Problem 10 (2025 AMC 12B)
practice.statement: The altitude to the hypotenuse of a right triangle is divided into two segments of lengths a and b by the median to the shortest side of the triangle. What is the ratio a:b?

practice.name: Problem 22 (2014 AMC 10A)
practice.statement: In rectangle $ABCD$, $\overline{AB}=20$ and $\overline{BC}=10$. Let $E$ be a point on $\overline{CD}$ such that $\angle CBE=15^\circ$. What is $\overline{AE}$?
